0x00.name: Not
0x00.description: Boolean NOT — inverts the result of the following conditional expression

0x10.name: DisplayMessage

params.name: message_id
params.description: Text message ID from scenario PZD

0x10.description: Display a dialogue message with speaker portrait and balloon

0x11.name: AnimationRequest
0x11.description: Play a unit animation (walk, attack, cast, idle, etc.)

0x19.name: MoveCamera
0x19.description: Move camera to a position with rotation, tilt, and zoom

0x1C.name: ChangeFrameRate
0x1C.description: Change the event playback speed (1=normal, 2=fast, etc.)

0x28.name: MoveToPanel
0x28.description: Move a unit to a map tile by walking

0x2E.name: FadeGradation
0x2E.description: Fade screen colors with a gradation overlay

0x3C.name: ChangeWeather
0x3C.description: Change the weather effect (rain, snow, etc.)

0x47.name: ActivateAnimation
0x47.description: Add a temporary event unit (ghost unit) to the map

0x48.name: WaitLoadAnimation
0x48.description: Wait for a ghost unit (AddUnit) to finish loading

0x49.name: ActivateAnimationStart
0x49.description: Signal that a ghost/added unit is ready to appear

0x63.name: SetMoveCameraFlags
0x63.description: Set camera interpolation curve (linear, ease-in, etc.)

0x64.name: WaitDirection
0x64.description: Wait for a unit to finish turning/rotating

0x67.name: DeadCode67
0x67.notes: All 10 uses are after EventEnd. Gibbed: Invalid (no handler). Vestigial/unreachable.

0x6B.name: PlaySoundEffect
0x6B.description: Play a background sound effect with echo, volume, and timing control

0x8F.name: AllGrayFilter
0x8F.description: Apply/remove a grayscale filter over the screen

0x90.name: WaitActivePanel
0x90.gibbed_note: 90 - waits for active panel x/y to match args

0x92.name: _InflictStatus
0x92.description: Inflict a status effect on a unit

0x9F.name: ButtonPressGoTo
0x9F.description: Wait for a specific button press, then jump to a target

0xA8.name: SetSpriteRenderParam
0xA8.gibbed_operands: U16=entity_id, U32=render_param. Writes U32 to anim_struct[343] via TIC render pipeline.

0xA9.name: InitSpriteRender
0xA9.gibbed_operands: Gibbed types: U16, U32 — U16 unused?

0xD1.name: SeekCodeForward

params.name: jump_distance
params.description: Number of forward blocks to skip

0xD1.description: Jump forward by N instruction blocks. Used for if/else branching.

0xD2.name: SeekCodeForwardTarget
0xD2.description: Mark a forward jump target label. Paired with SeekCodeForward (0xD1).

0xD3.name: SeekCodeBackward

params.name: jump_distance
params.description: Number of backward blocks to jump

0xD3.description: Jump backward by N instruction blocks. Used for loops.

0xD4.name: Terminate
0xD4.description: Terminate the current event script execution

0xD6.name: ConditionalStart
0xD6.description: Begin a conditional expression block. Conditions follow until code block.

0xE5.name: _WaitForInstruction

params.name: instruction_id
params.description: ID of instruction to wait for

0xE5.description: Wait until a previously started async instruction completes

0xF1.name: _Wait
0xF1.description: Pause event execution for N frames (60fps). Wait(1)=16ms, Wait(60)=1sec
